## Findings

### Observations

- Bidirectional coupling: "src" ↔ "src-3" (7+4 crossings) — consider extracting shared interface [warning]
- Hub: src/provider-interface.ts is imported by 3 zones — cross-cutting dependency [info]
- Size imbalance: largest zone has 17 files vs smallest with 3 — uneven decomposition [info]
- High coupling (0.71) — 7 imports target "src-3" [warning] (src)
- Low cohesion (0.29) — files are loosely related, consider splitting this zone [warning] (src)
- 9 entry points — wide API surface, consider consolidating exports [warning] (src-3)
- Contains 37% of project files (17/46) — may be too broad, consider splitting [warning] (src-3)
- High coupling (0.8) — 4 imports target "src-3" [warning] (src-4)
